title: callista perula
intro: Callista perula, also known as the "Pink Shellflower," is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a climbing legume that is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Callista perula can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
